text.title: Process Mining & Automation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: audit-event-log
step.action: Run pm-feasibility-audit.py to confirm case_id/activity/timestamp integrity.

step.name: discover-variants
step.action: Apply discovery algorithm; rank variants by frequency × cost.

step.name: score-feasibility
step.action: Map each variant to candidate automation; assign feasibility.

step.name: write-report
step.action: Assemble automation-assessment.md with evidence per candidate.
